name: TC-16: Add New Product Master Successfully
description: Adding a new product with unique SKU, name, unit, price, and min stock successfully lists it.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page at /login
Type admin@suryaelektrik.com in the email input field
Type password123 in the password input field
Click the Masuk ke Sistem button
Click the Master Produk sidebar navigation item
Click the TAMBAH PRODUK button to open the form modal
Type TS-KBL-SUP in the SKU input field
Type Kabel Supreme Test 4mm in the Nama input field
Type Roll in the Satuan input field
Type 600000 in the Harga input field
Type 12 in the Batas Minimal Stok input field
Click the Simpan Produk button to submit the form
Verify the modal closes and the table updates
Verify the product with SKU TS-KBL-SUP is listed in the products table
